comparable_engines.storage_strategy: heap + MVCC; sessions are in-memory backend state, not persisted across restart
comparable_engines.consistency_model: session-scoped state above ACID base; advisory_lock_session is process-bound and released on disconnect
comparable_engines.tradeoff_notes: session 即 backend process; 进程崩 → session 全失效; 与本项目 'process restart → tokens invalid' 完全同构

comparable_engines.consistency_model: optimistic check-and-set; tx aborts if watched key changed; no rollback of side effects since EXEC is atomic batch
comparable_engines.tradeoff_notes: tx 是 connection-scoped session; EXEC 失败仅放弃 batch, 不撤销已 issue 命令 (单 batch 原子); 与本项目 'abort 仅标 ✗ 不反向' 同构

comparable_engines.consistency_model: long-running tx as sequence of local tx + compensating actions; no global ACID; abort = run compensations
comparable_engines.tradeoff_notes: 本项目是 saga 的退化形态: lifecycle 边界存在, 但 box=dumb storage 不写补偿动作, 只标 ✗ + reason. 是 'saga without compensations'.

comparable_engines.storage_strategy: actor process holds state; ETS in-memory tables; supervisor restarts process on crash
comparable_engines.consistency_model: no tx; per-actor mailbox serialization; restart = state reset (let-it-crash)
comparable_engines.tradeoff_notes: actor model 的 session 与 process lifetime 绑定 · 进程重启 = 状态清零 · 与本项目 'token = session, restart wipes all' 哲学一致

comparable_engines.storage_strategy: single-file + WAL; temp tables/session attaches are per-connection
comparable_engines.consistency_model: ACID per connection; connection close = session state gone; durable storage unaffected
comparable_engines.tradeoff_notes: session = sqlite3 connection · 本项目 token ≈ connection handle 思想

comparable_engines.storage_strategy: WiredTiger; client sessions track operation_time/cluster_time tokens
comparable_engines.consistency_model: session-scoped causal consistency; client session token is opaque handle; expiry on idle timeout
comparable_engines.tradeoff_notes: client session token 与本项目 token 在形态上极像 (opaque string handle, server side state); 但 Mongo session 还携带 read_concern, 本项目更轻

relevant_papers.title: Sagas (Garcia-Molina, Salem)
relevant_papers.key_insight: 长 tx 拆为 local tx 序列 + 各自 compensating action; 用应用层补偿替代 ACID rollback
relevant_papers.applicability: 本项目是 'sagas without compensations' 形态 · 借 lifecycle 概念 (BEGIN/COMMIT/ABORT) 但不实现反向 op

relevant_papers.title: ARIES: A Transaction Recovery Method (Mohan et al.)
relevant_papers.key_insight: Write-Ahead-Logging + undo/redo + LSN 序列实现 crash recovery
relevant_papers.applicability: 本项目刻意拒绝 ARIES: dumb storage + durability=none, recovery 策略 = 'restart wipes session' 而非 redo log. 列出仅为对照说明 '不采用'

relevant_papers.title: Actor Model (Hewitt 1973) / Erlang 'Let it crash'
relevant_papers.key_insight: 并发实体 = process + mailbox; 失败时 supervisor 重启, 状态丢失视为正常
relevant_papers.applicability: 本项目 'process restart → tokens全失效, in-flight tasks auto-abort' 即此哲学的直接应用

relevant_papers.title: Generalized Isolation Level Definitions (Adya, Liskov, O'Neil 2000)
relevant_papers.key_insight: 用 history graph 形式化各 isolation level, 区分 anomaly
relevant_papers.applicability: 本项目刻意只给 'session_token_scope' 这一非标准弱级别 · 列此 paper 作为 baseline 说明 '为何不映射到任何 standard level'

design_tradeoff_summary.recommended_for_this_intent: neither — 本项目不动 storage 层, box 已有 FileStore (journal-replay), 本 tx 层只在内存维护 token map, 不引入新索引结构

design_tradeoff_summary.criteria: OLTP point read vs OLAP scan
design_tradeoff_summary.recommended_for_this_intent: row-equivalent (box item-by-item) · workload 是 point access, OLAP scan 不在范围

design_tradeoff_summary.axis: 强一致性 vs 高可用
design_tradeoff_summary.recommended_for_this_intent: neither — single_node, 无 partition 概念; consistency_tier=session 即进程内可见性, 不涉及多节点 CAP
嵌入式 / in-process · box-mcp 是 single process, token 仅 in-memory sync.Map, 无网络 round trip 进入 tx 路径

design_tradeoff_summary.criteria: abort 时是否真反向已写数据
design_tradeoff_summary.recommended_for_this_intent: soft mark-fail · box=dumb storage, ABORT 仅写 ✗ + reason 入 trace, 不撤回已 commit 的 storage 修改 (不变式 #10 + #11 联合约束)

design_tradeoff_summary.criteria: token 是状态句柄还是权限凭证
design_tradeoff_summary.recommended_for_this_intent: session token only · 不变式 #11: 'tokens are session state, not authorization'; 无 token 的写仍然成功 (保持 storage-only contract + 旧 224 测试不破)

bridge_judgment_note: L→K bridge 已 self-judge: 6 个 comparable engine 全部 source_kind=inference + do_not_cite=true · 模型未直接读取原文 · confidence ≤ 0.6. 4 个 standard tradeoff_axis 全列 (即使本项目 'neither' 也写明理由), 额外加 2 个项目相关 axis (soft mark-fail / session vs authorization) 不删原 4 个 (Omega2 monotonic).
